couche3.note: masque hydratant nuit, top sèche/sensible
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the mask hydrating and effective, particularly for dry and sensitive skin, with one noting it's a deep hydrating overnight treatment. Moreover, the product receives positive feedback for its soft, supple feel, beautiful glow, and versatility as a staple in skincare routines. However, opinions about value for money are mixed, with some finding it worth the price while others consider it pricey. Additionally, reactions to the mask are mixed, with some finding it suitable for sensitive skin while others report burning and bumps on their face.

reviews.author: Alaska Momma Mia
reviews.text: Dream to use while flying when skin is dry no matter what you do.  It covers face with a light non greasy feel, plumps up skin, makes it soft and supple.  Use it night before flying, morning of, after landing and day after.  Love don’t have to remove the mask.  No smell, gentle and moisturizing!

reviews.author: RH24
reviews.text: Very moisturizing and thick if that is what you desire. I purchased the mini for travel but will likely upgrade for use in every day life at home as it is worth the money spent. I've not experienced any irritation and I would recommend this product to family and friends.

reviews.author: Haylie
reviews.text: This stuff is great. My skin has been so freaking dry. I used this last night and it's a night and day difference. I can't believe it worked so fast. So glad I decided to try it finally

reviews.author: Emily Olenik
reviews.text: The summer Fridays jet lag mask is the best I helped me alot it is good for after the shower it is soft on the skin and I lot more you should get it!

reviews.author: Jenni
reviews.text: My favorite hydrating mask! Love the lip glosses too! The mask makes my skin feel so hydrated especially in the winter!

couche3.note: masque nuit hydratant, non gras
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the face mask effective, with one noting it helps their skin feel normal and another describing it as a perfect addition to their skincare routine. The product receives positive feedback for its texture, as it's not oily or sticky, and one customer mentions it soaks right into the face. Customers love the product's quality, and while some find it good but expensive, others say it's not worth the price.

reviews.author: Ryan Alton
reviews.text: I don't reviews often unless I love or hate a product. I love this one. I was on Accutane for 3 years before and now adapalene because my skin is horrible. I recently started the adapalene and just like when I was on Accutane,  the only thing that helped my skin feel normal again was this right here. I was starting to get flaky skin with redness around my eyes from irritation.  I put it on once and I feel so much better, I look so much better.  Im a dude, i don't typically care about this stuff. This is phenomenal. It won't help too much if you're skin is already good. It helps alot if you have a moisture/barrier problem.

reviews.author: Sam L.
reviews.text: I purchased Drunk Elephant’s F Vitamin Balm a few years ago and just recently purchased it again.  The pump is not working on this bottle.  So disappointed but I love the product so much I will be keeping it.  I will just deal with it. It is too expensive for the pump not to work properly hence only 4 stars.  Love the Product - Not the Pump.

reviews.author: Chu
reviews.text: LOVE this overnight mask. First tried as a free sample then purchased full size. Moisturizing but not oily. Just thick enough but not heavy. Feels like a lotion. Soaks right into my face. I use it after their Glycolic Serum at night. Feels refreshing and I’ll carry this traveling vs. my full bottle moisturizer.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.text:
Great cream to add to your skin care routine.


So far I’m liking it, my skin is soft and dullness is going away. Small bottle for the money, but 1 pump goes a long way so it will last a long time! I recommend adding to your skin care regimen.

reviews.author: Amy Peluso
reviews.text: We love the quality of other drunk elephant products and this did not disappoint!!! Leaves our skin feeling smooth and can’t beat the free shipping - saved me a trip to the store for an item that is usually sold out and I can’t get!!

couche3.note: peeling fort éclat/lisse; trop fort sensible/sèche
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the exfoliating solution effective, with their skin looking brighter and smoother after use, and one customer noting a difference after the first application. The product receives positive feedback for its value, with customers appreciating that it's good for the price and can be left on for 10 minutes. While some customers report no burning or irritation, others mention a stinging sensation. The color aspect receives mixed reviews, with customers noting the bright red liquid.

reviews.author: Cakes
reviews.text:
I purchased this on a whim because I enjoy a lot of the other Ordinary products.  I am not disappointed.  The instructions say to use it twice a week and I've had it for about a month now.  I can definitely tell a difference in the look and feel of my skin.  My friends tease me that I'm "translucent" but I'd argue that I simply have fair skin.  I do have sunspots and being 47, I'm determined to at least reduce their appearance.  After just a couple of weeks I noticed that my skin is a lot softer and brighter.  It usually takes quite a while to see results but I'm floored at this product!  I have high hopes that with continued use my skin will continue to improve because of how effective this product is.





While the instructions aren't 100% obvious about how much product to use, I fill the dropper and draw lines with it on my forehead, cheeks, and chin area.  I then lightly smear it around but I don't rub it in and I make sure that I can still see a layer of the product.  Once in a while I do feel a tingling/burning sensation and it only lasts for a moment and it's usually because I've done some hair removal a day or two prior to using it.  Overall, application is a breeze and it washes off very nicely. I  even once used my white wash cloth and the color came out in the wash!





The bottle size looks small but a little of the product goes a long way.  After a little over a month of use I'm probably not quite 1/4 through the bottle.  For something that is $10, that's a steal!  It's definitely worth more than what it costs.





If you're on the fence about this product - don't be.  BUY IT.  I've already gone ahead and purchased another bottle so I have it on hand.

reviews.author: Stephanie
reviews.text:
I absolutely love this peeling solution! From the first use, it delivered exactly what it promises: brighter, smoother, and more even-looking skin. The combination of 30% AHAs and 2% BHA works powerfully to exfoliate both the surface and deeper within pores, helping with dullness, texture, and congestion without the downtime of a clinical peel.





The texture is lightweight and easy to apply, and even though you feel a tingling sensation, that is normal with strong acids. When I followed the directions and left it on for 10 minutes, it never felt overly harsh. After rinsing, my skin felt noticeably smoother and more refreshed, with an immediate glow that lasted into the next day.





I also love how affordable it is for the results it delivers. This professional-level exfoliant feels like a luxury treatment at a budget-friendly price. Just remember to use it no more than once or twice a week, always after cleansing and before moisturizing, and always follow up with sunscreen during the day.





This is perfect for anyone looking for real exfoliation results, brighter and more even skin, or a budget-friendly but effective at-home peel. A few tips: patch test first, use at night on dry skin, and avoid it if your skin is sensitive or compromised.





I would definitely recommend this as a standout exfoliant in any skincare routine.

reviews.author: Jai
reviews.text: When I was looking at skincare products, I was looking for something that could target acne and could also help even my skin time. I’ve been looking at this product for a very long time the ordinary AHA 30% plus BHA peeling solution. I wanted to take time to use the product a few times to see the difference in my face so far I have used it about four times when I first put it on I do feel that very tingling or burning sensation, but it goes away after a minute or two that’s how I feel that it’s starting to work. It’s not a super thick solution so it doesn’t feel super kicked in my face. My face doesn’t feel like it’s hard to move and that’s something that I really like about this product I can say from the first time that I used it till now my skin is definitely made a difference is definitely clear and I would love to continue using this product and look into other products at this app, this is definitely something that I would recommend to. Everybody is very effective. It’s not going to destroy your skin for the size of the bottle. I see that it’s very affordable and I will be buying again absolute 10 out of 10.

reviews.author: Mai Y.
reviews.text:
This peeling solution really does what it says—it helps smooth skin texture and leaves my face feeling cleaner and more refreshed after use. I noticed a brighter look and a reduction in dullness when used correctly and not too often.





I’m giving it 4 stars because it is very strong and can feel a bit intense on sensitive skin, even with short usage time. You definitely need to follow instructions carefully and moisturize well after. Overall, great results, just not for everyday use!

reviews.author: Rebecca G
reviews.text: I think it works well. I’ve used it about 5 times as of this review. I’m seeing a slight improvement in the texture of my skin. It can tingle at times but is not uncomfortable. If you have an open pimple or nick, it’s gonna sting.  I would say it’s as advertised. I put it on with my fingers then set the timer for 10 minutes then follow up with a moisturizer.

name: Dr Dennis Gross Alpha Beta Daily Peel
ingredients: Step 1: Water/Aqua/Eau, Alcohol Denat. (SD Alcohol 40-B), Glycolic Acid, Potassium Hydroxide, Hamamelis Virginiana (Witch Hazel) Water, Salicylic Acid*, Polysorbate 20, Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Malic Acid, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Achillea Millefolium Extract, Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, Soy Isoflavones, Glycerin, Copper PCA, Zinc PCA, Lecithin, Alcohol, Polysorbate 80, Disodium EDTA, Fragrance (Parfum), Phenoxyethanol, Benzoic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate (* - exfoliant). Step 2: Water/Aqua/Eau, Sodium Bicarbonate, Ascorbic Acid, Retinol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Resveratrol, Ubiquinone, Adenosine, Achillea Millefolium Extract, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Soy Isoflavones, Phospholipids, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Copper PCA, Sodium PCA, Zinc PCA, Glycerin, Polysorbate 20, Octoxynol-9, Tetrasodium EDTA, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate

couche3.note: Peeling quotidien multi-acides (AHA/BHA), teint lisse et eclat ; puissant - prudence peau sensible et seche ; deconseille grossesse.
couche3.customers_say: Customers report that the skin exfoliant transforms their complexion, making it smooth, glowing, and even-toned. Moreover, they find it easy to use and consider it a must-have for their daily skincare routine, with one customer noting it can be used 2-3 times a week. The product receives positive feedback for its texture benefits, with one customer describing their face as fresh and plump after use. However, opinions on value are mixed, with some finding it worth the price while others consider it overpriced. Additionally, experiences with skin irritation vary, with some finding it gentle on sensitive skin while others report stinging sensations.

reviews.author: Melissa C.
reviews.text:
There is no denying that the Dr. Dennis Gross Alpha Beta Universal Daily Peel Wipes are an excellent skincare product. After using them, my skin texture is noticeably smoother, my pores look smaller, and it gives me an instant, healthy glow. The two-step chemical peel system is incredibly effective and easy to use without causing any harsh irritation.





However, my biggest complaint is the price point. For how expensive these are, I really think you should get more product in the box. Using them daily as recommended adds up fast, making it a pretty heavy investment for a monthly skincare routine.





Overall, it’s a high-quality product that delivers great results, but the value for the price could definitely be better. If you have the budget for it, it's worth it, but I wish you got more wipes for what you pay!

reviews.author: Mrs. Bartle
reviews.text: So a YouTuber I watch was showing  her items that she ordered from Amazon. Perfume, makeup, and this item. She wasn’t selling or promoting, she was just saying that these are items that I love. She mentioned that this item has made her face even toned, which she loved because her makeup was always blotchy.  Well, I have that same problem, so I thought I would try it. She was correct! My face is more even toned, less breakouts, and so smooth.  Totally recommend this product! Thank you Dr. Gross and thank you Jen Tracker 😊

reviews.author: Kristi C
reviews.text: I am 54 years old and have smoked since I was 15. (yes, I know, GROSS) I have only been using this a week and my skin already looks better. From someone with super dry skin, it is so moisturizing and feels great! Definitely will be continuing with full size product. So happy to have found and decided to try this!

reviews.author: Shantel Johnson
reviews.text: When it comes to Dr Dennis these are one of the best products it worked great on cleansing my face even after using a face cleanser they were a little strong but it was worth it his products are one of the best

reviews.author: Jessica
reviews.text: I was recommended these by a friend and I liked how they seem to work on my skin, they are expensive, but I find it worth it.

couche3.note: peeling AHA/BHA éclat, apaise; prudence sensible
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the face mask effective and appreciate how it leaves their skin smooth and soothed, with a radiant glow. The product receives mixed feedback regarding value for money, with some saying it's worth the price while others find it overpriced. Customers disagree on the product's sensitivity level, with some finding it harsh on sensitive skin while others report no stinging sensation. The ease of use is also mixed, with some finding it easy to apply while others struggle with getting the product out of the bottle.

reviews.author: teabeapea
reviews.text:
I'm brand-new to the world of chemical peels -- and therefore was very reluctant to try an at-home one. Several beauty bloggers I follow have featured the Drunk Elephant line of products, including the Sukari Babyfacial. What seems to set this one apart from the others are the ingredients (all natural, not animal tested, cruelty free). From what I read, this is a surprisingly effective skincare treatment for those with sensitive skin.





I've used it three times and have found that while there's very little redness following the treatment, I do need to use quite a bit of hydrating oil and moisturizer. But, it does the job! My skin is softer, brighter, and smoother. And the dark spots are just barely starting to show signs of fading. I'll take it.





A couple of things -- you'll need to skip ALL of your other skincare products that have acids in them. In fact, I'd suggest waiting until you use everything else up before purchasing this one ... well, I wish *I* had. Also, the pump design concerns me a wee bit -- as I worry that it will clog before I've finished the container. These new designs give you better control for dispensing the product (than an open jar), BUT, they can stop working. I'll report back accordingly.

reviews.author: Liz
reviews.text: I got this since my sister highly recommended it as a exfoliator. I used it for ten minutes (even tho it recommends 20 it’s really harsh on sensitive skin) and my face felt way smoother right after I took it off, although it was also really red. The next day all my acne has visibly gone down and even some acne scars disappeared. I use it once a week especially because it’s so harsh, but it really does the job. It comes with face oil, so that will help bring moisture back to the skin, but I skipped that since I live in such a humid area and I don’t want to become oily. Even though it’s really expensive it is worth the money.

reviews.author: Julie Anderson
reviews.text:
I don't usually leave reviews, however when I find something that works for me, I like to share my treasure!


This was an expensive roll of the dice for me, but google and chatGPT both gave it good reviews.


It has made my pores much smaller and has certainly removed a layer of dull skin. I've used it twice and will continue to use it once a week for the unforeseeable future!

reviews.author: Eugene
reviews.text: Leaves my skin so smooth and refreshed after each use. Gentle but effective exfoliation—definitely worth it!

reviews.author: Liz Smith
reviews.text: Awesome facial in a bottle! Love this product and will order more each month. Great results!

name: Origins Drink Up Intensive Overnight Mask

couche3.note: Masque de nuit ultra-hydratant (niacinamide, AH, avocat), ideal peau seche et lhiver ; parfume - prudence peau sensible ; un peu riche pour peau grasse.
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the face mask effective at moisturizing, particularly for winter dry skin, and appreciate its softness, with one noting it sinks perfectly into the skin. The mask has a pleasant fragrance, and customers like its consistency, with one mentioning it's not greasy. Opinions on value for money are mixed, with some finding it a good price while others consider it expensive.

reviews.author: Naomi
reviews.text: Very moisturizing, have been using this product for about 5 years and usually bought it from Macy’s but it’s the same product and cheaper from Amazon. I have combination sensitive skin and this works great with no irritation, however there is a slight scent (smells great) but if you are super sensitive to fragrance keep that in mind. I use it as a daily moisturizer for added hydration!

reviews.author: Gigi Pi
reviews.text: This is like my seventh tube of this product, ive been using it for YEARS, best overnight mask hands down. I have combination skin. Its heavy at first but sinks perfectly into the skin, then turns lightweight.

reviews.author: Ashley H.
reviews.text: This is my favorite face lotion. It feels hydrating and I love the scent.

reviews.author: faglie
reviews.text: Absolutely love these products! They are soothing and very effective.

reviews.author: greg stierwalt
reviews.text: Love this moisturizer!  I feel so refreshed and my face so soft.

couche3.note: baume répare barrière, apaise, top sensible/sèche, léger
couche3.customers_say: Customers find this moisturizer effective for skin barrier repair and appreciate its light texture that doesn't feel heavy or greasy. The product soothes and calms skin, with one customer noting it helps with eczema, and they report no breakouts or irritations. They like its compatibility with sensitive skin and its ability to relieve itching. The consistency receives mixed feedback, with several customers describing it as pretty thick.

reviews.author: VanillaPepper
reviews.text:
This is one of those products that I completely understand the hype around because it truly does work very well for dry, irritated, over-processed, or compromised skin areas. The texture is rich, soothing, and very protective without having a strong fragrance, which I appreciate because heavily scented skincare products usually irritate my skin immediately.





I have found this especially helpful for dry patches, irritation from weather, over-exfoliation, and areas where the skin barrier simply feels stressed or uncomfortable. A very small amount goes a long way and the tube itself lasted much longer than I expected.





That being said, for me personally this product is simply too heavy to use regularly on my face because I am somewhat breakout-prone with richer creams. While it feels incredibly soothing, I personally prefer using it more selectively on very dry or irritated areas rather than as an all-over facial moisturizer.





The packaging arrived perfectly sealed with no leaking or damage during shipping and the product looked exactly as expected upon arrival. For the amount you receive and how little is needed per use, I also think the value is very good compared to many other barrier repair creams.





Overall, I absolutely understand why so many people love this product and I do think it is excellent for repairing and protecting irritated skin — I just personally have to be careful about where and how heavily I apply it.





#FoundItOnAmazon #AmazonFinds #Skincare #SkinBarrier #LaRochePosay #SensitiveSkin #DrySkin #BeautyFavorites #EverydaySkincare #FrenchPharmacy #SelfCare #LuxeLife

reviews.author: Mariela Murillo Castro
reviews.text:
As a facial specialist, I recommend La Roche-Posay Cicaplast Balm B5 more than almost any other product in my arsenal. It’s one of those rare formulas that consistently delivers across skin types, conditions, and ages — and that’s not something I say lightly.





The combination of Panthenol (Vitamin B5), Madecassoside, and thermal spring water creates a truly reparative barrier treatment. I use it professionally on clients post-treatment — after chemical peels, extractions, and microdermabrasion — because it accelerates healing, reduces redness, and restores comfort almost immediately.





In my own daily routine, I apply it as a final step on dry or reactive areas and the results speak for themselves: skin feels protected, plump, and significantly calmer by morning.





What sets this apart from other healing balms is that it’s non-comedogenic and fragrance-free, making it safe even for the most sensitive or compromised skin. It doesn’t feel greasy or occlusive — just deeply nourishing.





Dermatologist-recommended, esthetician-approved. If there’s one product I would tell every client to keep on hand at all times, it’s this one.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.text:
I’ve seen La Roche-Posay Cicaplast Balm B5 recommended countless times online, so I finally decided to try it for irritated skin and a damaged skin barrier. It absolutely lives up to the hype for me. The texture is very rich and moisturizing, but it feels extremely soothing on dry, overtreated, or sensitive areas. I’ve used it on my face, hands, and other irritated patches of skin, and it really helps calm everything down.





The quality feels excellent, which is what I expect from La Roche-Posay. A little goes a long way, so I think it’s a very good value for the price. I also like that it’s versatile enough for the whole family. I’ve even shared it with my daughter, and we both love having it around for dry or irritated skin. Definitely one of those products I can see myself repurchasing regularly.

reviews.author: Adrienne
reviews.text:
Purchased since it was recommended by a dermatologist, and now I know why!! As someone who has to wash my hands and use hand sanitizer all the time at work (healthcare), my hands have become increasingly more dry and irritated. Especially during the winter months. This is the BEST thing I've used for moisturizing my hands. It makes an INCREDIBLE difference in not only how my skin looks, but how much better it makes my hands feel. There is no floral/strong fragrance, but it does have a subtle (medicinal?) scent to it- very tolerable as someone who cannot handle fragrances/scents well.


It's thick, creamy, and keeps my hands feeling so much better for so much longer than other moisturizers!

reviews.author: Yraima Batista Martins
reviews.text: I am very happy with this product. I have been using it on irritated and dry skin, and I noticed a big improvement in a short time. It has a smooth texture, absorbs well, and does not feel greasy. It helps calm the skin quickly and restores the skin barrier. I have used it both on my face and on small sensitive areas of the body, and it works very well in both cases. It is definitely a skincare essential that I will always keep in my routine. I highly recommend it.

couche3.note: masque tissu apaisant, anti-rougeurs, top sensible
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the face mask hydrating and effective at reducing redness, with one mentioning it's particularly helpful after laser procedures. Moreover, the product receives positive feedback for its quality, soothing properties, and suitability for sensitive skin, with customers noting their skin feels softer after use. However, opinions on value for money are mixed, with some finding it worth the $10 price while others consider it overpriced.

reviews.author: Gina Marciniak
reviews.text: This mask felt incredibly calming and refreshing on my skin. I have sensitive skin that gets red easily, and this helped soothe and hydrate my face without causing any irritation. My skin felt softer, smoother, and looked less irritated afterward. Definitely a great addition to a skincare routine for sensitive skin.

reviews.author: Elizabeth Gilstrap
reviews.text: I love these masks so much that i make sure to save the extra serum that’s left in the packages to apply at other times. Definitely worth the money, my skin always looks so great the next day (I do these at night before bed typically). Super moisturizing, I have extremely dry skin and they help a ton!!

reviews.author: StarsFan
reviews.text: These were amazing after my laser procedure! So cooling and soothing. Made my skin so soft and moisturized. I'm packing these when I go to Mexico to use after a long day in the sun! These are definitely going to be a staple in my cabinet from now on.

reviews.author: mary
reviews.text: My skin is very sensitive. This is a calming sheet that doesn’t flare my skin at all. My skin looks hydrated and plump after using. Of course that is  a temporary fix, but I love using it occasionally.

reviews.author: Kindle Customer
reviews.text: These masks make my face feel hydrated and dewy. It reduces redness and feels very soothing.

couche3.note: masque calendula apaisant, anti-rougeurs, sensible
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the face mask effective at reducing redness and soothing their skin, with one mentioning it works well for sunburn relief. Moreover, the texture receives positive feedback, with customers noting it feels soft and moist, and one describing it as having a jelly-like consistency. Additionally, the mask is easy to remove, and customers appreciate its quality, with one noting it's suitable for both day and night use.

reviews.author: Maggie Slivka
reviews.text: (Not medical advice, just my enthusiastic opinion)I love this product. If you have inflamed acne lesions, this can be a WONDERFUL product to have in your toolkit. While it’s not your traditional acne treatment, it’s my favorite product I’ve found (so far) to reduce redness. I typically use it as a spot treatment on inflamed acne lesions and sleep with it on. In the morning, the redness is typically significantly reduced. I also love to use it after any at home AHA treatment. I also love to use it after manual exfoliating treatments, specifically nano infusion. Be aware of potential allergy risk, patch testing is always recommended when starting a new product. Overall, this is one of my all time favorite products, that I cannot go without. When in doubt, hydrate and reduce inflammation

reviews.author: DivMom
reviews.text: This hydrating & soothing gel face mask not only does what its name says it will but it's an affordable indulgence as part of your self-care or skin-care routine. The gel feels light yet bouncy on the skin. After following the recommended time, I removed the mask with a cotton terrycloth face mask and was so happy with results! I tend to get red splotches on my chest and sometimes my cheeks. After using this my skin was soothed and the redness gone. In addition, my skin felt hydrated and relaxed. Easy to apply. Easy to remove. Fantastic results.

reviews.author: SoDoYouLikeBread?
reviews.text: Loveeee this mask! It’s great for dry, irritated winter skin that needs some extra hydration. It’s like a big sip of water for your skin. The mask is not sticky or goopy but has a jelly like texture. It absorbs super quick. I have used it has an overnight mask before if my face needed an extra pick me up. It’s definitely effective.The calendula in this is super soothing so I’d definitely recommend this mask for people with sensitive skin.

reviews.author: sherryl clark
reviews.text: I absolutely love this product line. My skin feels so soft and supple. It smells nice and not too flowery; very subtle. It’s a luxurious way to treat yourself.

reviews.author: Mandy
reviews.text: Soothing on my skin. Very little smell and seems to be helping in healing...

couche3.note: caféine poches/cernes; résultats variables, texture collante
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye serum effective at reducing puffiness and dark circles, though some report it made their under-eye area worse. The texture receives mixed feedback, with some describing it as smooth while others find it sticky, and customers disagree on whether it's worth the price. Moreover, several customers report skin irritation, with multiple mentioning serious reactions below their eyes.

reviews.author: Yunexi
reviews.text:
I usually deal with some puffiness under my eyes, especially after nights with less sleep, so I wanted something simple to include in my routine. This one stood out because it’s affordable and easy to use daily.


The first thing I noticed when it arrived was the minimal packaging. The bottle is small but practical, and the dropper makes it easy to control how much you use. The texture is very lightweight, almost watery, and it doesn’t have a strong scent, which I prefer for eye products.


After a few weeks of consistent use, I’ve noticed a slight improvement in morning puffiness. It’s not dramatic, but my under-eye area looks a bit more refreshed. It absorbs quickly and feels comfortable on the skin.


I’ve seen some people say it can make makeup crease, but that hasn’t been my experience. I just let it dry properly before applying anything on top, and it layers well. I usually apply my tinted sunscreen after, and it doesn’t pill or create any clumps.


What I liked most is how lightweight it feels, how fast it absorbs, and that a little goes a long way. One downside is that results are subtle and take time.


Overall, I’d keep using it and would recommend it if you want something simple for mild puffiness.

reviews.author: Katrina
reviews.text:
I’ve been using The Ordinary Caffeine Solution for a few weeks now, and I’m genuinely impressed with how well it works—especially for the price.


I tend to wake up with puffy under-eyes, and this serum has made a noticeable difference. You could not even see my eyelids earlier. It has a lightweight, slightly watery texture that absorbs quickly and doesn’t leave any greasy or sticky feeling. A tiny drop goes a long way, so the bottle lasts quite a while.


Within about 10–15 minutes of applying it in the morning, I can see a reduction in puffiness and my under-eye area looks more awake and refreshed. It also layers nicely under makeup without pilling, which is a huge plus.


I haven’t seen dramatic changes in dark circles (which I didn’t necessarily expect), but for depuffing and giving a smoother, more energized look, it definitely delivers.


If you’re looking for an affordable, effective eye serum to help with morning puffiness, this is absolutely worth trying. I’ll definitely be repurchasing.

reviews.author: Sam
reviews.text: I’ve been using The Ordinary Caffeine Solution 5% + EGCG and it’s good for the eyes. Over time, I noticed reduced puffiness and a fresher look, but it definitely takes a while to see results. The lightweight formula absorbs easily and layers well with other products. It’s not an instant fix, but with consistent use, it works.

reviews.author: Dee
reviews.text: This Ordinary caffeine solution stuff really works!  Got other under eye bag removal products beat by a mile.  Doesn't leave a film either.  No skin sensitivity. Easy to apply.

reviews.author: TAMMY MULLER
reviews.text: I absolutely love this stuff. It works amazing. It's nice and lightweight. It's very moisturizing and it gives the skin a nice glow.

name: CeraVe Eye Repair Cream
ingredients: aqua / water / eau, niacinamide, cetyl alcohol, caprylic/capric triglyceride, glycerin, propanediol, isononyl isononanoate, jojoba esters, peg-20 methyl glucose sesquistearate, cetearyl alcohol, dimethicone, methyl glucose sesquistearate, asparagopsis armata extract, ceramide np, ceramide ap, potassium sorbate, ceramide eop, sorbitol, carbomer, zinc citrate, behentrimonium methosulfate, triethanolamine, aloe barbadensis leaf extract, sodium lauroyl lactylate, sodium hydroxide, equisetum arvense extract, sodium hyaluronate, cholesterol, phenoxyethanol, prunus amygdalus dulcis oil / sweet almond oil, tocopherol, ascophyllum nodosum extract, laureth-4, hydrogenated vegetable oil, tetrasodium edta, maltodextrin, phytosphingosine, xanthan gum, butylene glycol, ethylhexylglycerin, chrysanthellum indicum extract

couche3.note: contour hydratant doux, rides/cernes; résultats variables
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye cream effective at moisturizing, particularly for dry skin and wrinkles, with a light texture that's gentle on the skin. The product receives mixed feedback regarding its effectiveness, with some reporting good results while others say it didn't work for them. Skin compatibility is also mixed, with some finding it suitable for sensitive skin while others report burning sensations. The product's impact on dark circles and puffiness is similarly divided, with some seeing visible improvements while others report no change. Customers disagree on the value for money, with some considering it worth the price while others find it expensive for the amount of product.

reviews.author: Caroline
reviews.text:
I’ve been using this eye cream for about four days now and I’m really happy with it so far. The texture is lightweight, absorbs quickly, and doesn’t feel greasy at all, which makes it perfect for daily use and under makeup.


I have sensitive skin and I’m happy to say that it doesn’t sting or irritate the eye area at all. It feels very gentle and soothing. I’ve already noticed that my under-eye area looks more hydrated, smoother, and refreshed.


The packaging is simple and hygienic, and a little product goes a long way. Overall, this is a great everyday eye cream that delivers hydration and comfort. Definitely a great option if you’re looking for something gentle and effective.





*****edit***** After a few more uses, I noticed that the packaging is quite difficult to work with. It’s not easy to get the product out of the tube, which can be frustrating during application. The cream itself is still great, but the packaging could definitely be improved.

reviews.author: Book Writer
reviews.text: I'd already tried the Estee Lauder and Clinique line which is what I've gone with for years. But when I did decide to try this I was surprised at how good it is, in every way too. It definitely moisturizes and hydrates the entire area and is making a difference in the puffiness. For this price EVERY lady should be using this. Now it works I'm telling  you, and others have remarked on the difference it makes! I squeeze out 3 tiny drops on my eyes, starting at the Crow's Feet area and working towards the inner corner area. It feels great going on, plus it works all day! A win-win all around!

reviews.author: vane
reviews.text: I've been using this eye cream consistently for about two years, and it has become a staple in my skincare routine. The formula feels very lightweight and absorbs well without feeling heavy or greasy on the skin. It provides great hydration around the eye area while still feeling comfortable throughout the day. One of the features I appreciate most is that it is fragrance-free, which makes it an excellent option for those with sensitive skin or sensitivities to strong scents. Overall, it's a gentle, effective, and reliable product that I continue to repurchase.

reviews.author: Shirong,Lin
reviews.text: CeraVe is a well-known brand and the cream feels gentle on the skin. It provides some moisture, but I didn’t notice much improvement in my under-eye area. It works okay as a basic eye cream, but the results were average for me.

reviews.author: Kiran
reviews.text: Best eye cream to rrestore skin barrier around eyes. Formula is not too wet, it dries down easily leaving skin very moisturized.

name: The INKEY List Caffeine Eye Cream

couche3.note: contour caféine éclat/poches, léger
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye cream adds just enough moisture to the under-eye area, leaving it looking brighter and refreshed throughout the day, with a silky texture that's smooth to apply. The product receives mixed feedback regarding its effectiveness, with some reporting good results while others say it doesn't work at all. While some customers say it doesn't irritate their sensitive skin, others report it stung their eyes, and opinions are divided on whether it reduces puffiness and dark circles. Value for money is also mixed, with some finding it good for the price while others say it's not worth the cost.

reviews.author: Kara
reviews.text:
This eye cream feels lightweight but still hydrating, and I really like it for tired mom mornings when my under-eyes look puffy or exhausted. It layers well under makeup and doesn’t feel greasy or heavy.





I’ve noticed my under-eye area looks smoother and a little more awake after using it consistently. A tiny amount goes a long way, and it absorbs pretty quickly so it’s easy to use in a rushed morning routine.





Definitely a nice affordable option if you want something simple for puffiness and hydration without a super thick texture.

reviews.author: Lori N.
reviews.text: This lightweight cream is easy to dispense and is moisturizing.  I have noticed a difference with just a few days of application. I use it on my eyelids as well. Dark circles are diminishing. I keep it in the refrigerator for an extra cooling effect. Very pleased with this cream.

reviews.author: iReviewForYou
reviews.text: Perks up my under-eye area when I wake up looking tired. Good price point. No odor, not greasy, doesn't clog pores, doesn't sting my sensitive eyes.

reviews.author: Nicole Harrison
reviews.text: Love this product!  Works really well!  Makes my under eyes noticeably less puffy!  One of my favorite under eye cream that actually works.

reviews.author: diane parman
reviews.text: It did not seem to work as well as the product I bought in the store. I bought more at the store.

name: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Eye Gel-Cream
ingredients: Water, Dimethicone, Glycerin, Cetearyl Olivate, Sorbitan Olivate, Polyacrylamide, Phenoxyethanol, Dimethicone/Vinyl Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Synthetic Beeswax, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Carbomer, Trehalose, Dimethiconol, Chlorphenesin, Laureth-7, Sodium Hyaluronate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Hydroxide, C12-14 Pareth-12

couche3.note: contour gel hydratant, ridules, léger
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye cream effective at moisturizing and working well under makeup, with a silky texture that feels nice while applying and afterward. Moreover, the product helps diminish eye lines and makes the area look better, while being good value for money and not leaving a greasy texture. However, opinions about skin irritation are mixed - while some say it doesn't irritate their eyes or skin, others report burning sensations. Additionally, skin sensitivity experiences are also mixed, with some finding it tolerable for sensitive skin while others report stinging and burning.

reviews.author: pleinelune
reviews.text:
First, I don't expect my eye area to look the way it did when I was 25 or even 50, but I just wanted it to look and feel better.





Just been using a few days, I put a little on during the day, and if I'm wearing makeup, works great under it, but make sure you let dry first and I put on at night.





Makeup goes on smoother and my eye area just looks more awake.  It's a gel, but I don't feel it's sticky.


I am sensitive to scent, but there is so little to this, it's fine.





It absorbs pretty quickly but you don't need much.  At night I add a little more a couple hours before bed so it can really soak in, I don't want to waste it on my pillowcase.





BOTTOMLINE:  Had little to no expectations, this exceeded them.  Will buy again.

reviews.author: Xtine
reviews.text: I have very sensitive, reactive, dry skin and I’m happy to say that I’ve never had an issue with it. It gives me the perfect amount of hydration, absorbs well into my skin, and wears great under makeup. I also like that it has zero fragrance. After trying many, many under eye creams, both high end and drug store, I always come back to this one.

reviews.author: MK
reviews.text: This is a nice eye cream. It is really light weight, and absorbs quickly. It doesn’t have many interesting and beneficial ingredients though. It has a very basic gentle hydrating ingredient list. It works well under makeup too!

reviews.author: Highly Observant
reviews.text: Used to use an eye gel that’s discontinued.  This is best I’ve found.  While it seems expensive to me, it does last pretty long.  One small dab per eye is all you need.

reviews.author: Sandra M.
reviews.text: Great Eye product.

name: RoC Retinol Correxion Eye Cream
ingredients: Ingredients Water, glycerin, lactose, C12-15 alkyl benzoate, cetearyl ethylhexanoate, PEG-100 stearate, glyceryl stearate, PEG-8, stearyl alcohol, tromethamine, panthenol, carbomer, isopropyl myristate, methylparaben, disodium EDTA, BHT, propylparaben, magnesium aspartate, zinc gluconate, chlorhexidine digluconate, retinol, polysorbate 20, copper gluconate

couche3.note: Contour des yeux au retinol, efficace sur rides/ridules et cernes ; le retinol peut irriter ou dessecher (prudence peau sensible) ; deconseille grossesse.
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye cream effective at reducing wrinkles and fine lines, noting that dark circles become less noticeable.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.text: I used it for a few weeks 4 times a week and notices reduction of wrinkles . No irritation.

reviews.author: Kelly
reviews.text: This is the best eye cream. I highly recommend.. I am 50 and it really helps with wrinkles

reviews.author: NILDA B. QUINTANA
reviews.text: This is a repeat purchase. I use it daily and its very very good. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Kb
reviews.text: Great deal! For this product!

reviews.author: Luz Marina
reviews.text: Lo maximo

name: Olay Eyes Ultimate Eye Cream
ingredients: Water, Vinyl Dimethicone/Methicone Silsesquioxane Crosspolymer, Glycerin, Niacinamide*, Isohexadecane, Isopropyl Isostearate, Stearyl Alcohol, Palmitoyl Pentapeptide-4**, Dimethicone, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Dimethiconol, Cetearyl Glucoside, Cetearyl Alcohol, Laureth-7, Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Cetyl Alcohol, Behenyl Alcohol, Disodium EDTA, Polyacrylamide, PEG-100 Stearate, Titanium Dioxide, Benzyl Alcohol, Methylparaben, Propylparaben, Ethylparaben, Iron Oxides* Vitamin B3, ** Amino-Peptide

couche3.note: contour teinté éclat; hydratation mitigée
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye cream decent and appreciate its skin-colored tint that brightens the eyes. The texture receives positive feedback for being silky and leaving the skin soft, with no greasy residue. However, the moisturizing effect and value for money receive mixed reviews, with some saying it works well while others report it doesn't moisturize properly and consider it expensive for the small container size. Moreover, customers disagree on the gentleness, with some finding it comfortable while others report skin irritation, and the effectiveness against puffiness is also mixed, with some reporting success while others see no improvement.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.text: I don't have really dark circles, but often have puffiness under my eyes. I've used this cream for years and very much love how well it works in masking the puffiness and redness under my eyes when needed. It goes on smoothly with just a few pats and blends well with all of my other products (mainly CeraVe).

reviews.author: Marilyn In Austin
reviews.text: I love this eye cream and have used it for many years. I find it as good as those that come from MDs and also high-cost department store brands. I buy it on Amazon when I notice it on sale below the price I usually pay.  It’s a great product at a very reasonable price.

reviews.author: TracyH
reviews.text: I have been using this product for years.  I naturally have dark areas under my eyes and this product not only moisturizes, but also covers the dark circles

reviews.author: Cynthia LaChance
reviews.text: Great to moisturize face during day. Good for primer

reviews.author: Sally A Sampson
reviews.text: Feels Nice on the skin.  Minimal results

couche3.note: contour cernes; résultats variables
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye cream's texture smooth and appreciate its cooling applicator tip. The product receives positive feedback for its quality, with one customer noting it serves as a good base for makeup. Dark circle coverage and effectiveness receive mixed reviews, with some customers reporting improvement while others say it made their dark circles worse. Eye irritation is a significant concern, with multiple customers reporting it made their eyes itch. Value for money opinions are divided between those who find it worth the price and those who consider it overpriced.

reviews.author: vonorim
reviews.text:
This has become one of my favorite eye products. First of all, the applicator is fantastic, it makes applying the cream really easy and feels cooling and soothing under the eyes. The formula itself is lightweight, smooth, and not heavy at all.





One thing I’ve learned is that this eye cream works best at night, unless you really take the time to rub it in completely during the day. If it’s not fully blended, it can sit a bit on the skin, so I personally love using it as part of my nighttime routine and letting it absorb while I sleep.





Overall, it feels gentle, hydrating, and brightening, and it gives my undereye area a refreshed look. If you’re looking for a high quality eye cream with a great applicator from a brand you can trust, this one is definitely worth trying.

reviews.author: Cahanlin
reviews.text: I really like this eye cream. I like the cool feel of the applicator when I put it on my eye bags. It is a light color and very smooth. I’ve been using it twice a day for about two months and the puffy area under my eyes has significantly decreased. The dark color has also faded at least to half of what it was. I’m happy with this eye cream and will continue to use it. A few reviewers mentioned a light scent. I have not noticed any scent.

reviews.author: Lo
reviews.text: I’ve used this before and it really works! The secret is consistency. However, if you stop using it, your dark circles will come back asap! The only problem for me, which makes it difficult to include in my routine, is that it’s almost impossible to apply makeup on top of it… it will ruin the makeup. So, it’s hard to use if you’re planning to apply it before work and then put on makeup.

reviews.author: Grace
reviews.text: This eye cream is a light pinkish color and when used around the eyes it helps to cover dark circles and redness. Also a nice emollient eye cream.

reviews.author: Guillermo Espinoza
reviews.text: Good product very happy with it also affordable

couche3.note: contour riche hydratant, top sèche, poches
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye cream effective at hydrating the under-eye area and removing puffiness, with a smooth texture that feels great on dry skin. The product receives positive feedback for its moisturizing properties, with one customer noting it makes skin more supple. While some customers say it's very gentle on sensitive skin around the eyes, others report irritation. The appearance receives mixed reviews, with some praising its dewy glow while others dislike the green color, and the consistency is also mixed, with some describing it as thick while others find it watery. Value for money opinions are divided between those who find it well worth the price and those who consider it overpriced.

reviews.author: Erin George
reviews.text: 42F, noticed my eyelid skin was crepey and I had trouble finding a product that targeted this. I’ve been using this product for about a month and am noticing a smoother texture on my eyelids. I put the product on fairly thick AM and PM predominately on eye lid and a light layer under eye. With this technique, I would say the consistency is slightly greasy but I think that is what’s helping improve the texture, and it does absorb in after a little time. I do not wear eye make up, so this should be considered if you do (lighter layer, letting absorb before applying make up, etc). Overall I am very happy with this product and will continue to use. Previous eye products have sometimes left a burning feeling on my sensitive eye lids or led to irritation, and this one is very soothing with no issues.

reviews.author: B. Charlton
reviews.text:
I learned about this from asking my AI app. I was so pleased when it had a high rating and after reading reviews, I ordered it immediately.





Lucky for me, I have very few wrinkles at 66. But most of the other eye creams would soak in and my eye skin would get dry in just a few hours. Eye balms were great but would usually leave a heavier layer than I would like.





This cream is AMAZING! It softened my skin instantly while leaving a light, silky texture.





Since I just put it on, I'll update this if anything changes. But so far very happy!

reviews.author: Camille Perez
reviews.text: This eye cream has become an essential part of my skincare routine! The texture is silky, lightweight, and absorbs beautifully without feeling greasy. It leaves my under-eye area feeling deeply hydrated, smooth, and refreshed. After using it consistently, I noticed my skin looks brighter, softer, and more awake. It also works great under makeup and doesn’t irritate my sensitive skin. A little goes a long way, and the quality feels luxurious. If you’re looking for an eye cream that truly makes a difference, this one is definitely worth trying!

reviews.author: Elliot Martin
reviews.text: Highly recommend Kiehl’s Avocado Eye treatment!  Not greasy, leaves my under eyes looking moisturized and hydrated.  I recommend purchasing the biggest container! It is my absolute favorite!  The results are amazing!

reviews.author: Milt
reviews.text: After applying this avocado eye cream for 4 days now my wife said she’s noticed a bit of more moisture and healthier smooth texture under my eyes. It dries quickly and its odorless. She’s happy I am too.

couche3.note: contour vit C/peptides hydratant, non gras
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye cream effective, making their eyes look better, and appreciate its moisturizing properties that keep the area hydrated. The product receives positive feedback for its texture, with one customer noting it's not greasy, and its smooth application. While some customers consider it worth the money, others find it overpriced, and opinions about skin sensitivity are mixed. The quantity aspect also receives mixed reviews, with customers noting that only a small amount is needed.

reviews.author: Jennifer Prock
reviews.text: This eye cream is fabulous. It’s super moisturizing and doesn’t irritate the sensitive skin around my eyes. It definitely improved the appearance of the dark circles under my eyes. While it didn’t remove my dark circles 100%, it visibly improved the texture and feels super hydrating.

reviews.author: Elaine H.
reviews.text: This line is the BEST I have ever used.  I will be signing up for auto ship!!  The cleanser, it only takes a small amount, dry hands and dry face. It removes everything. I love the eye cream and eye serum also. I’m telling you, it is all sensational!!

reviews.author: KJ
reviews.text: This is seems good but I think there’s others I like better. Nothing wrong with it though. Just feels expensive without results I’m looking for

reviews.author: Patricia P.
reviews.text: Just started to use - seems better than most. Texture is nice not greasy like some.  Too early to tell as far as  dark circles go.

reviews.author: daniel harman
reviews.text: Great product!

name: CeraVe Skin Renewing Eye Cream
ingredients: AQUA / WATER / EAU, PROPANEDIOL, GLYCERIN, NIACINAMIDE, CETEARYL ALCOHOL, CETEARYL ETHYLHEXANOATE, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, DIMETHICONE, PETROLATUM, POLYACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER-6, HYDROGENATED LECITHIN, CERAMIDE NP, CERAMIDE AP, CERAMIDE EOP, CARBOMER, BEHENTRIMONIUM METHOSULFATE, TRIETHYL CITRATE, CAFFEINE, SODIUM HYALURONATE, SODIUM LAUROYL LACTYLATE, SODIUM LACTATE, CHOLESTEROL, PALMITOYL TRIPEPTIDE-1, PALMITOYL TETRAPEPTIDE-7, PHENOXYETHANOL, ISOPROPYL MYRISTATE, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, TRISODIUM ETHYLENEDIAMINE DISUCCINATE, PHYTOSPHINGOSINE, XANTHAN GUM, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, POLYSORBATE 20, BENZOIC ACID

couche3.note: Contour des yeux peptides+cafeine+ceramides, leger et hydratant, bon sur ridules et cernes, excellent rapport qualite-prix ; quelques cas dirritation signales - prudence peau tres sensible.
couche3.customers_say: Reconstruit depuis les avis : contour des yeux tres apprecie, leger et non gras, hydrate toute la journee, attenue ridules/pattes doie et cernes, petit format mais une noisette suffit, bon rapport qualite-prix. Quelques utilisateurs signalent irritation/dermatite (peau sensible).

reviews.author: mk
reviews.text:
I have recently started to use CeraVe Moisturizing Lotion.  I have been using Clinique products for several years, namely the cleanser/ toner/ serum/ moisturizer and night cream routine.  As of lately I just wanted to simplify my routine up.  I have really started to become aware of what I’m putting on my face.  I prefer a simple facial routine for myself.  (I don’t want 7 layers of serum, creams, facial spritz and various oils for a day/night facial routine, like you see in all those YouTubers and celebrities demoing their facial routines).





So, it comes down to a simple basic facial cleanser, toner and this CeraVe Lotion.  Morning and Night.  I use the lotion both on my face and body.  Two in one.  The lotion is amazing.  Makes my face so soft, supple and happy.  There’s none of that shiny or greasy residue after putting it on my face - or visibly showing up shiny when out in daylight view.  But at the same time, it give my face a very clean, natural and healthy glow.  This lotion does not disappoint.  I will be using it as my moisturizing routine from here on out.  It’s also so much lighter than the added layering of serum, and heavy night cream I’ve previously been using.  It’s that good.  A little goes a long way, when applying to the face - just a dab or two max, is all one needs.

reviews.author: Georgia A. Morgan
reviews.text: I started using this eye cream about 18 months ago because my eyelids had begun to look crepey and tired. I am 65 so that's not a huge surprise. I use this daily on my eyelids, under my eyes, crow's feet, just above eyebrows, and upper lip (whatever is left over after the eyes). I began to notice improved skin tone and color (eyelids, not under my eyes; i don't have circles or bags there) within the first week and the skin around my eyes felt smoother, more supple, and just more comfortable. It has become my daily routine and I am very happy with the results, particularly since the crepey look as disappeared. I have never had any kind of irritation from this eye cream; it is soothing and quickly absorbed. The first tube lasted over a year, so I think the value for money is good as well.

reviews.author: m.king
reviews.text:
I have been very pleased with the performance of this eye cream. I incorporate it into both my morning and evening skincare routines, and it consistently keeps the under-eye area hydrated and smooth. I have found it particularly effective in the mornings when my skin typically appears fatigued.





The formula is lightweight, non-greasy, non-fragrant, and does not cause any skin irritation. Furthermore, it layers seamlessly under makeup without feeling heavy. Overall, this is a reliable, high-quality product that has become a staple in my daily regimen.

reviews.author: Era
reviews.text: Really great eye cream so far just starting using so can't give it five stars.  It very light and moisturizing don't dry all sticky or cakey.  It absorbs really well so you don't see a film on the under eye like some eye creams can cause.  Its a good price point compared to some expensive products they may not work.

reviews.author: Daliyla wright
reviews.text: Love all CeraVe products, in my late 40,s and helps so much with aging

This is perfect for an older person with dry skin problems! And now they I have it on subscription is so much cheaper and it’s making a huge difference under my eyes! I am sure that if I used it daily it would make a faster improvement! The applicator that comes included to apply it makes it so much easier to apply the product correctly and too me it helps to make the eyes and other areas like over lips, forehead and other areas where you have issues! I live in an area that has really hot weather and cold winters! It’s line of products for moisturizing my dry skin has been very helpful and effective! Totally satisfied and very happy to see the importance of seeing such a great improvement and how much detail are used to make this product and the quality of other items that you brand offers with great effectiveness to improving the amazing results that I am seeing in such a way that I never imagined! I highly recommend anyone to try it! I am sure that they will be start using a lot of the amazing products that your brand has once they see the best results! Like I have had!

reviews.author: M Colly
reviews.text: A bit too expensive, but the product works! The slanted tip applicator works well to help distribute the product around the eyes.  Will only use at night due to price, but your eyes will look refreshed in the morning - I have tried MANY eye creams - this 1 is the real deal!

reviews.author: Amy CC
reviews.text: Love the tube with the ceramic tip for applying the eye cream.  It feels so nice and cool going on.  Does its job well too of decreasing puffiness in my eyes.  Moisturizes well and doesn't over-do it either.

reviews.author: Daniel
reviews.text: The eye cream has substance and helps with puffy eyes.  It's not the best eye cream available, but it's well worth the price.

reviews.author: Adela Guzman
reviews.text: My daughter loves this brand!

name: Naturium Vitamin Bright Illuminating Eye Cream

couche3.note: Contour des yeux illuminateur (vitamine K, pigments), hydrate et camoufle les cernes instantanement ; bien tolere ; effet eclat immediat.
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the eye cream moisturizing and effective for dark circles, with subtle pigments that brighten the under-eye area. The product has a nice sheen and soft texture, and one customer notes it works well for sensitive skin. The quantity receives mixed feedback, with several customers mentioning it's barely half full, and opinions on value for money are divided, with many finding it extremely disappointing for the price. Skin irritation experiences are mixed.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.text:
It is a little effective on lessening under eye circles. I like the subtle sheen it gives.





However, I’m having a hard time getting the look how I like it with my tinted spf moisturizer that I love. Even with just a teeeeeny bit of this product, I don’t like the contrast of the lightness of this product with the very minor tint of my moisturizer.





Also, even with my untinted spf moisturizer, I find that I get collected residue at the corners of my eyes by midday. This product is pretty thick, even when I try to apply the smallest amount I can with my pinky.





Finally—this is my own dumb fault with online ordering—the jar is hilariously tiny. Now, like I said, a little goes a long way, so I get it, but wow. It’s smaller than a single serve cream cheese.

reviews.author: JKVK00
reviews.text: I'm satisfied with this product.  I bought the deep version, I have light to medium complexion and it blended it well even though it appears too dark, it really isn't.  It's more moisturizing than what I was using so I was pleased by this added benefit.  I am a minimalist when it comes to makeup so this serves me well.  I bought the jar in October and I'm still using it in January so it does last quite awhile.  It will probably last another 2-3 months if I had to guess.  Definitely will buy again.

reviews.author: Linda E.
reviews.text:
Might be great under the eye but I bought it specifically for my eyelids.  Research said it would be good for the discoloration on the lid itself.  Unfortunately, my eyes cannot tolerate using it that way.  Even using it only at night, my eyes the next day could barely function.


I tested to make sure it was because of the product and yes, it was. So I don't recommend it ON the eyelid.

reviews.author: Pharlan Ives
reviews.text: Wakes up my eyes! I like this brand and have found their products work well for my sensitive skin. The product is lightweight and feels like a tinted moisturizer but for eyes.

reviews.author: HTedino
reviews.text: A moisturizing illuminating eye cream to aid in helping to brighten up fine lines and under eye circles. It doesn’t irritate my eyes and the color of the cream is golden!

name: Hero Cosmetics Mighty Patch Original
ingredients: Hydrocolloid

couche3.note: patch hydrocolloïde boutons, tous types, doux
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the acne patches effective, particularly for whiteheads, and appreciate their quality, ease of application, and compatibility with all skin types, noting they don't irritate sensitive skin. The patches stick well throughout the night, though opinions on value are mixed, with some finding them worth the price while others disagree. While many love the patches, some report they leave red circles on their face.

reviews.author: Amy Biggs
reviews.text:
Effectiveness: These Mighty Patch Original hydrocolloid patches have been absolutely incredible for treating breakouts quickly and effectively without harsh chemicals or painful extraction. The patches work remarkably well overnight, drawing out impurities and reducing the size and inflammation of pimples by morning. I love how they protect blemishes from picking and touching, which prevents further irritation and scarring. The clear design makes them virtually invisible during wear, so I can use them during the day without feeling self-conscious. The patches stick securely without being painful to remove, and they genuinely speed up the healing process compared to leaving breakouts untreated.





Quality: Hero Cosmetics has created an exceptional product with these hydrocolloid patches that clearly demonstrates superior manufacturing quality. The adhesive is perfectly balanced - strong enough to stay in place through sleep and daily activities but gentle enough to remove without skin irritation. The hydrocolloid material is high-grade and effectively draws out fluid and impurities without over-drying the surrounding skin. The patches maintain their integrity throughout wear and don't fall apart or lose effectiveness. The sterile packaging ensures product safety and hygiene, which is essential for treating open or inflamed skin.





Value for Money: These pimple patches provide outstanding value when you consider how effectively they treat breakouts while preventing scarring and further damage from picking. The cost per patch is reasonable considering the dramatic results they deliver, often clearing blemishes faster than expensive acne treatments. The prevention of scarring alone makes these worth far more than their price, as treating acne scars is much more expensive and time-consuming than preventing them. The convenience and effectiveness make these far more cost-effective than multiple skincare products or dermatologist visits for individual breakouts.





These patches have become essential in my skincare routine and consistently deliver impressive results. Highly recommend for anyone dealing with occasional or persistent breakouts who wants fast, effective treatment!

reviews.author: Lasanda s.
reviews.text:
I bought these because I ran out of Curology patches that I got with the free trial. These work similarly; you’ll need one or two patches to fully get rid of the pimple— it depends on how large & inflamed it is. Even if you need two the first patch will still a do a good job of draining most the gross fluid out.





I like that these are more translucent/transparent than some other brands I’ve seen. They’re not obnoxious looking if you’re wearing one or two in the daytime.





The adhesion has been great so far. I’ve tried it on bare and moisturized skin and either way it holds up. Once it’s been stuck in place for a few minutes you can apply a moisturizer on your face OVER the patches without them slipping off. Just use a gentle touch.





There’s probably cheaper pimple patches from smaller brands but $4.49 (before tax) is definitely a reasonable cost for 30 patches So I gave it 4 stars for value for money.





My only qualm is that the small size pimple patches could stand to be at least slightly bigger. Only new closed comedones that are just forming are that small (typically). Otherwise I’m satisfied with this purchase.

reviews.author: KittyLove
reviews.text: I have struggled with stubborn breakouts and the awful dark marks they leave behind for years. This combination of hydrocolloid pimple patches and the natural Skinlyte Kojic Acid Soap here on Amazon have completely changed my skin. They work like a team to eliminate acne and prevent scars entirely. Using these two products together is the magic formula. The patches cover the acne while the Kojic Acid soap applied as a serum on the acne immediately cleans up any minor redness or leftover discoloration. The retinol in the formula quickly dries up the acne. My skin is completely clear, smooth, and even-toned. I highly recommend buying both. I have also noticed that using the kojic acid and retinol combo soap by itself as a target serum on acne without the patch also helps clear up the acne in about 3 days without leaving any traces. I am pleasantly surprised at the easy 1 step, very affordable solution.

reviews.author: Valerie
reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Works Great and Helps Me Leave My Skin Alone!





The Mighty Patch Original from Hero Cosmetics has been a great addition to my skincare routine. These patches work really well at drawing out impurities overnight and noticeably help reduce the size and appearance of blemishes.





What I appreciate most is that they also keep me from picking at my skin, which makes a big difference in how quickly things heal and how my skin looks afterward. Just putting a patch on makes it easier to leave it alone and let it do its job.





They’re easy to use, stay on well, and are discreet enough to wear at home or even during the day if needed. Overall, a simple but very effective product that I’ll definitely keep repurchasing!

reviews.author: Tara
reviews.text:
These work amazingly well! I just stick one on before bed and by morning the pimple is noticeably flatter and less red. It really does what it says without any picking or irritation.


They stay on all night even if I toss and turn, which I was surprised by, and they don’t feel uncomfortable at all while sleeping. I also like that they’re thin and kind of blend into the skin, so you don’t really notice them if you wear them during the day either. Super simple, effective, and way less stressful than dealing with breakouts the usual way. They fit well and the size is great, really absorbs all the yuck from a pimple. A great value for money!

name: Starface Hydro-Star Patches
ingredients: Hydrocolloid

couche3.note: patch boutons fun, tous types
couche3.customers_say: Customers find these pimple patches effective and easy to use, with positive feedback about their adhesiveness and portability, noting they fit well in purses and are perfect for traveling. Customers appreciate their appearance, with one customer mentioning they clear up hormonal acne blemishes overnight. The effectiveness and adhesiveness receive mixed reviews - while some say they work well and stick well, others report they don't work at all and don't stay in place. Value for money is also mixed, with some finding them worth the price while others consider them overpriced.

reviews.author: Nylah
reviews.text:
I’m honestly obsessed with these little star patches! 🌟 They’re super cute AND they actually work. I put one on at night and by morning my pimple looks calmer, less red, and way flatter. They stay on really well and don’t irritate my sensitive skin either. Plus, I love that they’re perfect for wearing around the house without feeling ugly lol. 💛✨





Ingredients + Why I love them:


• Hydrocolloid – pulls out gunk & reduces inflammation without drying my skin


• Aloe Leaf Extract – naturally soothing & helps calm redness


• Witch Hazel Extract – helps shrink blemishes and reduce swelling


• Allantoin – softens and supports skin healing


• PEG-12 & Dimethicone – helps the patch stick smoothly and protect the spot





If you want something cute AND effective with gentle ingredients, these star patches are totally worth it! ⭐️

reviews.author: Jessica F.
reviews.text:
I got these Starface Hydro-Star pimple patches for my sister, and she absolutely loves them! She’s obsessed with the cute star shape, and the included case makes them super easy to carry around or keep organized.





The patches work well. They stick securely and help protect blemishes while you go about your day. Plus, the fun design makes skincare a little more enjoyable. Definitely a perfect gift for anyone who loves skincare with a playful twist!

reviews.author: MrsSD
reviews.text: I had gotten the blue version of this and when I saw the yellow, I HAD to have it. It’s ADORABLE. I’ve bought from this brand before and LOVED it as well. My son won’t wear any other brand of pimple patches. He even sports them at school. Will definitely buy from this brand in the future.

reviews.author: Anabel
reviews.text: They do work. I love how they’re convenient and cute and it’s really easy to use them and sick them. They don’t leave or stick off your face and they’re really convenient.

reviews.author: Kandice
reviews.text: I think it is so cute and fun but the ONE problem is that the patches stick to the top of the the thing when you pull them I will add a photo so you can see

couche3.note: lotion séchante boutons overnight; assèche (prudence sèche/sensible)
couche3.customers_say: Customers find the drying lotion effective, working fast and clearing blemishes overnight. The product improves skin appearance by relieving redness and swelling, and customers consider it worth the price. However, customers disagree on whether it dries out the skin, with some finding it extremely drying while others say it doesn't cause dryness. Moreover, the product has mixed reactions regarding skin sensitivity, with some finding it stinging while others say it doesn't bother them at all. Additionally, the fragrance receives negative feedback for being strong.

reviews.author: Amy Biggs
reviews.text:
Effectiveness: This Mario Badescu Drying Lotion has been an absolute game-changer for dealing with occasional breakouts and stubborn blemishes. The overnight spot treatment works incredibly fast - I often wake up to find that angry, inflamed pimples have significantly reduced in size and redness after just one application. The zinc oxide and sulfur formula is powerful yet gentle enough that it doesn't over-dry or irritate my skin like some harsh acne treatments do. I love how it targets specific spots without affecting the surrounding healthy skin. The pink sediment at the bottom contains the active ingredients, so shaking it up and applying with a cotton swab gives precise application exactly where needed.





Quality: Mario Badescu has built an excellent reputation in skincare, and this drying lotion maintains their high standards for effective, gentle formulations. The 1 fl oz bottle contains a surprisingly long-lasting amount of product since you only need tiny dabs for spot treatment. The consistency allows for precise application without waste, and the formula stays effective throughout the life of the product. The ingredients are well-balanced to provide acne-fighting benefits without the harsh side effects of more aggressive treatments. The packaging protects the formula integrity, and the dropper-style application method ensures hygiene and prevents contamination.





Value for Money: This drying lotion provides incredible value when you consider how effectively it treats breakouts and prevents them from becoming larger, more inflamed problems. The small bottle lasts for months of regular use since you only apply it to specific spots, making the cost per treatment very reasonable. When I compare this to dermatologist visits or expensive acne systems, getting professional-quality spot treatment at this price is remarkable. The peace of mind knowing I have an effective solution for unexpected breakouts makes this worth far more than the modest cost.





This has become my go-to emergency treatment for breakouts and consistently delivers fast, effective results. Highly recommend for anyone dealing with occasional acne or needing reliable spot treatment!

reviews.author: Justice
reviews.text:
I've found Mario Badescu Drying Lotion to be an effective overnight spot treatment for reducing the appearance of blemishes. For first-time users, it's important to follow the instructions carefully: do not shake the bottle.





The product is designed with two separate layers. The pink sediment at the bottom contains the active ingredients—salicylic acid, sulfur, zinc oxide, and calamine—that help dry out blemishes. The clear liquid on top serves as the carrier layer. To use it properly, you dip a cotton swab straight down into the pink color sediment and then apply it directly to the blemish. If the bottle is shaken, the layers mix together and the product will not perform as intended. You'll need to let it sit undisturbed on a flat surface until the layers separate again.





My main complaint is the packaging design. The pink sediment settles at the bottom of a bottle, making it difficult to retrieve the product with a cotton swab. Once the swab reaches the bottom, it can be surprisingly hard to take it out from the bottle.





I also think the bottle opening could be redesigned to imitate the function of a typical nail polish bottle, with a built-in wiper that removes excess product from the applicator. As it is, a standard cotton swab picks up far more product than needed for a single blemish, resulting in unnecessary waste. I often find myself trimming away some of the cotton from the swab before use to reduce product absorption.





I like the product, there is no skin irritation for me. One bottle last a long time. Overall, the formula works well, but the packaging could be much more user-friendly and efficient.

reviews.author: Henry Truong
reviews.text:
I’ve been using the Mario Badescu Drying Lotion on and off for a couple years now, and honestly, it’s one of the few skincare products that consistently works for me. Anytime I feel a pimple forming or see one starting to surface, I dab a little on before bed, and more often than not, it’s either gone or significantly reduced by morning.





It’s not some miracle overnight fix for every kind of breakout, but it works best on whiteheads or those little surface-level pimples. You definitely have to follow the instructions don’t shake the bottle! Just dip a cotton swab straight into the pink sediment at the bottom and dab it on. It dries quickly and smells a bit like rubbing alcohol, but I don’t mind it.





I will say it can be drying if you use it too often or on the same spot repeatedly, so I usually pair it with a good moisturizer the next day. Overall, it’s just a great spot treatment to have on hand. Would definitely repurchase.


Value for money:


Last a long time, although it does seem small


Why did you pick this product vs others?:


It had more positive reviews, and had proof of it working online.


Lightweight:


feels like nothing on your skin once it dries, but works like magic!


Effectiveness:


awesome, my pimples deflate over night!

reviews.author: Heather
reviews.text: Omgosh I bought this a year or two ago and had to come back and write a review! I have always used this for a pimple or a blemish but the other night I got attacked by a no-see-um or mosquito and got seven bites on my legs. As I was dang near gouging my skin off from the itch and had nothing specific to use, I pulled this out. Within LITERAL seconds, the itch and burn of the bite was gone! I only put one drop on each bite and it was MAGIC! Not only that, I don’t know if you know about a good mosquito bite, how swollen and inflamed that they get, but the next day between the sulfur and the salicylic acid in this drying lotion, the inflammation and swelling was minuscule! This is definitely a 3-1 attack on bug bites! The sulfur pulled out the Poison, the calamine lotion stopped the itch, and the salicylic acid dried out the blemish, all within 24 hours! I am now a user of this for life!!! Beyond grateful for this product!

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.text: This is an oldie but a goodie. Has helped reduce inflammation in all pimples. Easy to use but read the instructions! Lasts forever.
