ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Dimethicone, Cetearyl Olivate, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Flour, Sorbitan Olivate, Polyacrylamide, Synthetic Beeswax, Phenoxyethanol, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Butylene Glycol, Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Panthenol, Chlorphenesin, Dimethiconol, Carbomer, Laureth-7, Chrysanthemum Parthenium (Feverfew) Flower/Leaf/Stem Juice, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Hydroxide, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Extract, Centella Asiatica Extract

couche3.note: Gel a l avoine apaisant, sans parfum, tres bon peau sensible/reactive; leger.
couche3.customers_say: Customers find this moisturizer effective for dry skin and appreciate that it doesn't irritate sensitive skin, leaving it soft and smooth without a greasy feel. The product receives positive feedback for its fragrance-free formula, lightweight texture, and soothing properties, with one customer noting it's recommended by a dermatologist. While many customers report it calms redness, some mention it clears very red, irritated skin.

reviews.author: Barbie
reviews.text: Let me start by saying I have VERY sensitive skin. I can't wear makeup and the only face wash I can use is Olay. Everything else makes me break out in hives. But I am able to use this moisturizer with no negative reactions. It's a little heavier than I would like, but it leaves my face feeling very soft. If it was a little lighter, it would have been perfect. But I'm satisfied with it. The jar size is pretty good. You only need a tiny little dab to moisturize your whole face, so it should last quite a while. All in all, a very good product.

reviews.author: Michael Chang
reviews.text: I have sensitive skin and this moisturizer works really well—it’s lightweight, absorbs quickly, and helps calm redness. It feels refreshing without any sticky residue. Just wish it came in a bigger size for the price. Still a solid daily moisturizer for gentle hydration.

reviews.author: S.L
reviews.text: Great! Very moisturizing and great for oily sensitive skin. Non sticky, very lightweight and refreshing. Doesn’t feel heavy or greasy afterwards.

reviews.author: Linas A. Orentas
reviews.text: Love this product. Is clean, light, and makes my skin feel so refreshed!

reviews.author: Pat Bankston
reviews.text: Love this .Im very sensitive ...I did fine with this cream

name: Cetaphil Night Moisturizer Lightweight
ingredients: Water, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Hydroxyethyl Urea, Cyclopentasiloxane, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Homarine HCL, Sodium PCA, Cetyl Alcohol, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenoxyethanol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Erythritol

couche3.note: Hydratant de nuit leger a l AH, sans parfum, sensible/non comedogene; juste pour tres seche.
couche3.customers_say: Customers find this moisturizer effective for sensitive skin and appreciate its light, non-greasy texture that makes their face feel smooth. The product absorbs well and is particularly suitable for nighttime use, with one customer noting it doesn't feel heavy or cause breakouts. While some customers report no irritation, others experience burning sensations. Customers consider it a good value for money.

reviews.author: Henry Broussard
reviews.text: I love this product. I have used Elta MDPM Therapy for  years, but it's gotten too expensive ($48 for a bottle that lasts 2 weeks at best. I was afraid to try another product because I have very oily acne- prone skin. My esthetician,who knows how oily and sensitive my skin is,recommended this to me as a less expensive, but high-quality alternative to Elta MD PM( now $48).  She was right!, and she said all her clients are talking about this Cetaphil.EI have been using  Cetaphil it for a month and I've had no problems with blemishes. It's very lightweight, non-greasy. I'm even using it during the day now  and it  even minimizes fine lines. I feel hydrated, but not oily. Good for sensitive skin, no irritation, just softness!I t's an amazing , affordable product Buy it! I'll continue to buy it when I run out, but it's a large enough bottle, I expect it to last awhile. The pump works very well, unlike Elta MD pumps that  break so often.  I won't ever go back to Elta MD PM. Cetaphil Night has won me over!

reviews.author: Jamie
reviews.text: I have rosacea and oily skin with blackheads. I realized that I had a niacinamide sensitivity and was using Cerave PM and decided to switch to this. Very lightweight almost runny compared to the Cerave PM but feels really good on my reactive skin. I’d like to eventually try Vanicream to compare but this is a great option for barrier repair and oily skin. Lastly, I heard that some versions contain niacinamide so you may want to check your specific bottle in case you have a sensitivity to that.

reviews.author: Mayalpaca
reviews.text: Cetaphil is so incredibly moisturizing, especially for the winter. It's very lightweight, not a heavy moisturizer by any means, it's very smooth, and has no smell. My skin absorbs it really well and it gives me a glow, I feel like it does make my skin look greasy though. The top swivels around to be able to press it out. Overall, good night moisturizer for me but not for someone who wants something a bit more intensive. Also a little small.

reviews.author: Selim Yazicioglu
reviews.text: This moisturizer is super good, no scent, no greasiness, it’s not thick so the skin absorbs it well, no irritation on my sensitive skin. It moisturizes well, lasts long and most importantly it doesn’t make my skin break out.

reviews.author: Jane
reviews.text: This is a really great moisturizer!  Great price, works well, super light! I’ve tried all the moisturizers, expensive to mid priced and I keep coming back to this.

name: The INKEY List Bio-Active Ceramide Moisturizer

couche3.note: Creme aux ceramides+peptides, plush, reparation; ideale seche/sensible, riche pour grasse.
couche3.customers_say: Customers find this moisturizer deeply hydrating and appreciate its plush, smooth texture that's not heavy or greasy. Moreover, they report noticeable improvements in fine lines and their skin glows more after use, while the product absorbs beautifully. Additionally, they consider it good value for money, and one customer mentions it's perfect for dry and sensitive skin.

reviews.author: JenW
reviews.text: I am on my fourth empty jar of this cream! My husband discovered it when he ran out of his usual and used mine one morning and now he is a fan as well. I have sensitive and combination to oily skin and was a little afraid of the cream being too heavy or too much on my oily skin, however I found that it absorbs very well, keeps my skin hydrated and I don’t get too oily throughout the day. In the summer, I used a little bit of matte setting powder since I tend to get more oily. I feel like my skin is healthier, my skin barrier is better than it’s ever been, and it does plump the skin. My husband says he’s seen a difference after one jar. A little bit goes a long way for me so one jar can last a while but at this price point I can slather it on if I feel inclined and I’ve never found anything better. I’m a little bit of a skin fanatic so I’ve used everything from La Roche Posey to Kiehls to Elemis to Beauty Pie and a number (read A LOT) of K beauty brands and this is by far my favorite cream for everyday usage. In the winter, my skin does tend to get a little more irritated and dry so I use a hydrating toner or a hyaluronic serum underneath just to give some additional moisture. Definitely worth a try!

reviews.author: Donna Reid
reviews.text:
I’ve been using The INKEY List Bio-Active Ceramide Repairing Cream for a few weeks now, and I’m genuinely impressed. My skin tends to get dry, sensitive, and irritated, especially when using active treatments, and this cream has been a total game-changer.





The texture is rich but not heavy or greasy—it absorbs beautifully and leaves my skin feeling deeply hydrated and calm. After just a few days, I noticed less redness, smoother texture, and my skin felt stronger and more balanced. It layers well under sunscreen and makeup, which is a big plus.





If you’re dealing with a compromised skin barrier, dryness, or sensitivity, this is an excellent, affordable option that truly delivers results. A little goes a long way, and it’s fragrance-free, which my skin really appreciates. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Ticana1
reviews.text: I have extremely sensitive skin amd this really hlped my skin it did wht it ws supposed to.. my skin felt moisturized it melted right in no scent or vry soft .. a new addition to my skincare … gd price thnks

reviews.author: Kathy
reviews.text: This is a great product and priced well except that they can't get the lid to screw on properly! It's DEFECTIVE and I'm hoping to let them know. I am surprised they haven't fixed it yet.

reviews.author: LISA ELLIS
reviews.text: Great product. It leaves your skin hydrated. Not sticky or slimy. Feel great.

couche3.note: PHA doux (gluconolactone) + niacinamide et aloe : exfolie en surface tout en hydratant → un des rares exfoliants pensés pour les peaux sensibles/sèches.
couche3.customers_say: Customers find this PHA toner gentle and hydrating; many with sensitive skin say it smooths texture without stinging or dryness.

reviews.author: Skincare with April
reviews.text:
This has been a great addition to my routine. I use it twice a week for both my AM and PM exfoliation days, and it works beautifully without irritating my skin. It gently smooths texture while still locking in moisture, which is hard to find in an exfoliating toner.





The PHA and niacinamide combo leaves my skin feeling soft, balanced, and refreshed, never tight or dry. I also love that it’s fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin. If you want a mild exfoliant that actually supports your skin barrier, this one is excellent.

reviews.author: Ashli
reviews.text: I love this toner. It’s a staple in my nighttime skincare routine. It gets my sensitive skin right and is pretty gentle on it too. No burning, no breakouts. For me, at least. Everyone is different.

reviews.author: PW
reviews.text: This is a really good product. I saw results within 2 days after using it. My skin looks much healthier and not so dull.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.text: It's not terrible, but left my skin feeling kind of sticky for some reason.

reviews.author: Cristina
reviews.text: Cleared up my skin so well!

couche3.note: Acide lactique 5% (la version DOUCE, vs la 10%) + acide hyaluronique : lisse le grain et illumine en restant tolérable — bon palier d'entrée aux acides pour peaux sensibles.
couche3.customers_say: Customers find this a gentle, affordable exfoliant that brightens and smooths skin; appreciated by sensitive-skin users as a mild entry-level acid.

reviews.author: Karp
reviews.text:
I’ve had the product for about two months now I can’t say what has changed because I don’t see much of change in regards to dark spots and etc. The hydration of the product is not very hydrating, I don’t think it is alone by any means a primary source of hydration. It also has a nice little stick to it after it dries.


I should add which very important. It didn’t break my skin out which makes this superb. My skin is sensitive I know this because I’ve tried other serums that have broken my skin out in ways I’ve never seen before as well as sunscreens. I’ll continue to use it, and edit if any c

reviews.author: Tonya Simmons
reviews.text:
I’ve been using The Ordinary Lactic Acid 5% + HA a few nights a week, and it’s made such a difference in my skin’s texture. It gives a light tingle at first but nothing harsh. After a couple nights, my skin looked smoother and more even, especially around dry or dull spots. I love that it’s budget-friendly yet performs like high-end exfoliants. I always follow with moisturizer and SPF the next morning — and my skin has a soft, healthy glow I didn’t have before.





🌸 Honest note: This is a mild AHA, so if you’re new to acids, this is a great starting point.

reviews.author: Tiara Chanel
reviews.text: I love this! My naturally dry skin was really bad after I had my last baby. It had dry patches all over my face. I was really nervous about using something new and I've never tried a chemical exfoliant but I heard good reviews about it. Adding this to my skincare routine has made my face look better than it has in years! It even lightened up some old acne scars a little.

reviews.author: abby washburn
reviews.text:
i’m actually using this twice a week on my body to fade some scars. it’s a great intensive treatment for this, but it isn’t irritating at all.


despite coming in a tiny bottle (because it’s meant to be used on the face), it has lasted me almost 4 months!


and the price, it goes without saying, is AMAZING. an awesome value!

reviews.author: Michelle
reviews.text: I am new to using this product.. but so far I love it!  Leaves skin nice and smooth.  It didn’t dry out my skin too much.  So far I have only used 3 times… once every few days at night.  Leave on overnight.  I will be purchasing more in the future.  Great price!

couche3.note: Glycolique faible dosage (5,25%) + kale antioxydant : exfoliant « d'introduction » formulé pour les peaux réactives qui débutent les acides (sans parfum).
couche3.customers_say: Customers describe it as a gentle, beginner-friendly exfoliant that evens texture and tone without irritation; praised by reactive-skin users.

reviews.author: Nic T
reviews.text:
The Exfoliating Euphoria:





Gentle Glow-Getter: With a 5.25% AHA blend, it promised mild exfoliation and delivered just that. My skin felt smoother without any harsh tingling sensations.


Ingredient Intrigue: Kale? In skincare? Yep! Loved how it's packed with antioxidant-rich kale to fend off environmental stressors while glycolic acid gently sloughed off dead cells.


Hydration Hug: Unlike other AHA products that left my skin feeling parched, this one felt hydrating, thanks to aloe and hyaluronic acid in the mix.


Sustainable Sensibility: Kudos to KraveBeauty for being eco-conscious. The

reviews.author: KR
reviews.text: This stuff is amazing!  I have some large pores around nose area that is hard to cover with foundation.  I use this and it plumps up underneath so the pores aren’t open.  I like the idea of how gentle this is on my skin and not using a harsh scrubbing like all the others out there.  Pretty good stuff that I had ordered another bottle for later.

reviews.author: CE
reviews.text: Very gentle! I have sensitive skin and this did not irritate it. After just a couple uses, my skin felt really soft and clean. Great value as well for the amount and quality of the product. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.text: Started to take better care of myself, this product was highly recommended by my research.

reviews.author: meh1017
reviews.text: Gentle but effective exfoliation. Perfection, no notes
